raw.message: NO DOWNLOAD. JUST TAP TO PLAY

hook.summary: A hand uses a stylus to connect dots on a circular track to guide a car.
hook.visual_action: A stylus draws a yellow line between two dots while a car follows the path.

scene_flow: A hand uses a stylus to draw a path between two yellow dots on a circular track.
A second path is drawn between red dots, adding a second car to the track.
A third path is drawn between blue dots, and all three cars move simultaneously.
The cars successfully navigate the paths without colliding, completing the puzzle.
TikTok outro screen with a search bar for the game account.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy minimalist logic puzzles and satisfying spatial challenges.
